title: poa trivialiformis
intro: Poa trivialiformis, also known as common meadow-grass or Poa annua's close relative, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa trivialiformis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. It is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
